headline: Global Payments Enhances Restaurant Tech Portfolio With AI POS Launch
summary: GPN introduces an AI-powered Genius handheld POS with voice ordering, offline payments and kiosk support for restaurants.

headline: Lines, Pressure and Lost Profits: New Research from Global Payments Highlights the Cost of Order Anxiety at Restaurants
summary: ATLANTA, May 14, 2026--Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) today released new research revealing the hidden impact of stressful quick service restaurant (QSR) ordering moments.
